---
pagetitle: "Matthew Burns — Senior Data Scientist / ML Engineer"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

<div class="container py-5">

<div class="row align-items-center mb-5">
<div class="col-lg-8">

<h1 class="fw-bold mb-1">Matthew Burns</h1>
<p class="lead mb-3"><strong>Senior Data Scientist / ML Engineer</strong> &mdash; Supply Chain &amp; Logistics ML</p>

I build production ML systems that work outside the notebook &mdash; from end-to-end NLP pipelines on 130M-row datasets to collaborative filtering at scale. My background spans mechanical engineering, supply chain operations, and a Master&rsquo;s in Applied Data Science, giving me an edge on problems where domain knowledge and ML engineering depth both matter.

<div class="mt-4">
<a href="/projects/" class="btn btn-primary me-2">View Projects</a>
<a href="/about.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">About Me</a>
</div>

</div>
</div>

---

## Featured Projects

<div class="row g-4 mb-4">

<div class="col-12 col-md-6">
<div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
<div style="overflow:hidden; height:180px; background:#f0f4f8; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;">
<img src="/projects/amazon-sentiment-ml-eng/system_architecture.svg"
     alt="System architecture diagram"
     style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover;">
</div>
<div class="card-body">
<span class="badge bg-primary mb-2">ML Engineering</span>
<h5 class="card-title">
<a href="/projects/amazon-sentiment-ml-eng/" class="stretched-link text-decoration-none">
From Notebook to Production: Sentiment Analysis at Scale
</a>
</h5>
<p class="card-text text-muted small">
End-to-end NLP pipeline on 130M Amazon reviews &mdash; production-style architecture with fallback chains, failure-mode analysis, and monitoring.
</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<br />

<div class="col-12 col-md-6">
<div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
<div style="height:180px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #325d88 0%, #29abe0 100%); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;">
<span style="font-size:4rem; line-height:1;">&#x1F3AE;</span>
</div>
<div class="card-body">
<span class="badge bg-secondary mb-2">Recommender Systems</span>
<h5 class="card-title">
<a href="/projects/steam-recommender/" class="stretched-link text-decoration-none">
Steam Game Recommender System
</a>
</h5>
<p class="card-text text-muted small">
Collaborative filtering on implicit user feedback &mdash; ALS model trained on Steam playtime data to surface personalized game recommendations.
</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<div class="text-center mb-5">
<a href="/projects/" class="btn btn-outline-primary">All Projects &rarr;</a>
</div>

---

## About Me

From mechanical engineering to supply chain analytics to ML systems &mdash; my career has followed the data. I&rsquo;m currently finishing a Master&rsquo;s in Applied Data Science, applying rigorous methods to high-impact problems in forecasting, NLP, and optimization.

<div class="mt-3">
<a href="/about.qmd" class="me-3">More about me &rarr;</a>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/matthewsburns849/" class="me-3" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
</a>
<a href="https://github.com/msburns24/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub
</a>
</div>

</div>
